extra.reason: Mechanical AppKit deprecations replaced with modern APIs; WebView/DOM + flush-window deferred to macdown-8tk.5, C prototypes to macdown-8tk.2, drag-and-drop fixes to macdown-8tk.10.
Added MPRenderer markdown->HTML characterization suite (MPRendererTests.m, 19 tests; full suite 39 passing). Editor-side autocomplete tests split to macdown-6st.

WKWebView scaffolding + macdown-asset scheme handler + navigation landed and verified (CSS, Prism, mermaid, MathJax, relative images, tables render; editorOnRight + link-cancel review fixes confirmed). Later stages tracked by sibling beads; drop-prevention .5.6 and off-main-thread reads .5.7 filed from review.
Implemented in PR #4 review round 1: decidePolicyForNavigationAction cancels unexpected main-frame navigations (non-asset-scheme, non about:blank), blocking file/text drops into the preview.
Implemented in PR #4 review round 1: MPAssetSchemeHandler now reads off the main thread (global queue) and replies on the main queue, guarded by liveTasks.

MathJax typeset-complete wired through WKScriptMessageHandler (weak wrapper, exactly-once via per-load generation/flag, reset at didStartProvisional, -close teardown). init.js posts mathJaxEnd. Stock CDN MathJax 2.7.3 fires 'End', so the #548 bundled-patch workaround is unneeded. Runtime-verified exactly-once; 45 tests pass.

Ported DOMNode+Text walk to injected JS (Intl.Segmenter, PRE>CODE=0/inline-code=1 preserved, runtime-verified words=4/chars=32/noSpace=29); updateWordCount async via evaluateJavaScript; cached body background color refreshed on load, redrawDivider reads cache. Local code-review fixes (weak-self) applied. 45/45 tests pass.
Scroll-sync rebuilt for WKWebView (async metrics + window.scrollTo); runtime-verified bidirectional tracking

Not reproducible under lldb or Xcode; all 78 bundled PNGs verified clean (pngcheck + sips); no loose PNGs in bundle. ImageIO debugger-only diagnostic, invisible to users, likely a legacy-WebView image load removed by the WKWebView migration. Recurrence recipe documented in notes.
Fixed in batch PR (transparent-divider normalization + stale Terminal-prefs outlet removal)
Fixed in batch PR (transparent-divider normalization + stale Terminal-prefs outlet removal)
copyFiles now treats a 0-byte data-dir style/theme like a missing one and replaces it with the bundled default (won't clobber non-empty user edits)

Replaced node-sass+primer-markdown@4 generator with a curl/github-markdown-css script + committed CSS; dropped the Transpile Styles build phase. Plus copyFiles empty-file self-heal (112) and Browser-default label.

Fixed Settings/Preferences window layout under modern AppKit: toolbar overflow (NSWindowToolbarStylePreference), Rendering pane control overlap + Graphviz/Mermaid alignment/spacing, pane width, and renamed window to 'Settings'. Follow-up localization refresh tracked separately.

Implemented 3-level local-file access scope (document subtree / +parent / any file) honored by the asset-scheme gate, plus file:// body-URL rewriting to macdown-asset. Shipped on revival/wkwebview-local-asset-scope.
